testcase.name: test_super_admin_global_schedules

failure.message:
AssertionError: Global schedules failed: {"message":"Internal server error","details":[{"error":"4 validation errors for GlobalScheduleEnhanced
draw_name
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
open_time
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
close_time
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
draw_time
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]}
assert 500 == 200
 +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_iteration29_lottolab.py:71: in test_super_admin_global_schedules assert response.status_code == 200, f"Global schedules failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Global schedules failed: {"message":"Internal server error","details":[{"error":"4 validation errors for GlobalScheduleEnhanced
draw_name
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
open_time
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
close_time
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
draw_time
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'schedule_id': 'sched_xe...T04:14:49.698253+00:00'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_global_schedules_count
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration29_lottolab.py:311: in test_global_schedules_count assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
